eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Faribault, MN; at 4:18 PM on JUN 16, 2019 Effective until 4:48 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test only. Test from the Faribault County Sheriff's Office. This is a test only. Test from the Faribault County Sheriff's Office.
